title: Quiz Question Generator
description: Generate a mixed set of quiz questions for a topic, with an answer key.
template: Help me write quiz questions for {subject}, {gradeLevel}, on {topic}. Write {questionCount} questions. Then follow these rules exactly: 1) Write exactly the requested number of questions — count them before answering. 2) Number them 1, 2, 3, and so on. 3) Mix multiple-choice and short-answer. 4) Do NOT put any answers next to the questions. 5) After the last question, write the heading 'Answer Key' and list every answer by question number.
